debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
⊢ U ∼ V ↔ ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id

failed_attempts:
by
  constructor
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
    use f, Function.invFun f
    constructor
    · ext x
      exact Function.leftInverse_invFun hf.1 x
    · ext x
      exact Function.rightInverse_invFun hf.2 x
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    refine' ⟨f, _⟩
    constructor
    · intro x y h
      apply_fun g at h
      simpa [hgf] using h
    · intro y
      use g y
      simpa [hfg]

Iff.intro
    (fun ⟨f, hf⟩ ↦ ⟨f, Function.invFun f, Function.leftInverse_invFun hf.1, Function.rightInverse_invFun hf.1⟩)
    (fun ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ ↦ ⟨f, ⟨Function.LeftInverse.of_comp hgf, Function.RightInverse.of_comp hfg⟩⟩)

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
    use f, f.invFun
    exact ⟨funext f.right_inv, funext f.left_inv⟩
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use f
    constructor
    · intro x
      apply congr_arg
      apply hgf
    · intro y
      apply congr_arg
      apply hfg
